info.title: dotnet-reqube
info.description: A tool that converts ReSharper inspect code report to SonarQube format

options.name: --input
options.description: Required. ReSharper report in XML format.

options.name: --directory
options.description:
Directory where reports will be saved. Working directory
will be used if not set.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Project to create SonarQube report for. If not set, a
report is written for all projects found in the solution.

options.name: --exclude-rules
options.description:
Specify the ReSharper rules to be excluded from the
analysis (Issue[TypeId] from ReSharper's output). The
format is <type id>[##<message regex>]|<type id>[##<message
regex>]...E.g. CSharpErrors##The modifier
'public'.*|UnusedMemberInSuper.Global|NotAccessedField.Glob
al

options.name: --sonar-dir
options.description:
The path to the .sonarqube directory of the executing sonar
analysis.
